title: wasm: .expect() in online_users() panics on serialization failure
description: serde_json::to_string(&users).expect() at wasm/src/api.rs:257 panics if serialization fails. In Wasm, a panic is an unhandled JS exception that can crash the page. The adjacent js_sys::JSON::parse already has a graceful fallback but this step does not. Fix: replace .expect() with .unwrap_or_else(|_| "[]".to_string()).
